title: haplopappus carthamoides var. subsquarrosus
intro: Haplopappus carthamoides var. subsquarrosus, also known as a variant of a flowering plant species, is a perennial herb native to the western United States and Canada. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is rich in flavonoids and terpenoids, which have been shown to provide various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Haplopappus carthamoides var. subsquarrosus can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion to utilize its medicinal properties.
